description.value:
Category: Clan

Prerequisite: Hanami clan (Sakura/Haruno Clan)

You have become adept at aiding allies from the sidelines, by doing absolutely nothing. You are completely certain that what you are doing helping. You gain the following benefits:

• Increase your Constitution score by +1 up to a maximum of 20.

• As a full turn action, you can choose to cry. When you cry, you shout the name of an ally to come help you. This ally immediately gains a will of fire. An ally can benefit from this feature twice per long rest.

• When you deal damage with a taijutsu or medical jutsu, or would be targeted by an attack or saving throw from a hostile creature, you can choose to deal 0 damage, or let the attack hit you, or fail the save. When you do, one ally within combat gains an immediate reaction which they can use to teleport to within 5 feet of you and either cast a jutsu with the casting time of one action that attacks the creature you hit or that hit you, or protect you from that hostiles creature's effects.

• For every round you do not deal damage, you increase the damage reduction granted by jutsu that would reduce damage, or medical jutsu that would restore hit points, by your level.
